form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 2130m at this track beaten 16 m by Akabah (2:39.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 60 on March 24 at $13. At her previous start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track beaten 16 m by Im Rockin Rod (2:06.00) in NR up to 55 on March 17 at $81. Has some ability and can do much better from the pegs draw.

form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when sixth behind Lukes Mistake at Busselton over 2030m in a 3yo+ NR 50 to 59 on January 9 at $8. Should be there at the business end.
